style_guide: Moody, warm, editorial food/drink photography. Deep espresso-brown ambient background consistent with palette #14110D/#1F1A14. Warm low directional light (single key light, soft falloff), antique-gold rim highlights (#B9883E/#E2B765), occasional muted clay-red prop accents (#8C4A30). Shallow depth of field, shot from 30-45 degree angle unless noted as top-down. Dark slate or wood surface. No on-image text, no logos, no people's faces. Photoreal, not illustration. Ugandan/East African restaurant context where relevant (e.g. matooke, posho, banana leaf, copper mugs for cocktails).

Belgian waffles stacked, drizzled with syrup, light dusting of powdered sugar
Classic pancake stack with butter pat melting on top and syrup pour

Crispy chicken burger, golden fried fillet, fresh vegetables, bun toasted
Mini pepperoni pizza personal size, melted cheese, slight char on crust
Spiced chicken pilau rice with grilled chicken piece, garnished, top-down angle
